title.zh: AI 技术运营 / DevRel | 技术布道 · 社区生态 · AI 工作流
title.en: AI Tech Operations / DevRel | Technical Evangelism · Community · AI Workflow

summary.zh: 纽约大学（NYU）计算机科学硕士，具备中英双语全职业沟通能力。融合顶级工程经验（Google）、AI 快速原型构建能力（Coze、n8n、Cursor）与开发者社区实践（Herstory Web3 助教、Women Coding Community 参与者），擅长将复杂 AI 模型转化为高质量 Demo 与技术内容，通过技术布道与社区驱动的产品迭代，连接开发者与产品生态。
summary.en: Bilingual DevRel & AI Product Expert with an M.S. in Computer Science from NYU and full-professional English proficiency. Brings a unique blend of top-tier engineering experience (Google), rapid AI prototyping (Coze, n8n, Cursor), and hands-on developer community engagement (Herstory Web3 TA, Women Coding Community participant). Passionate about bridging the gap between complex AI models and developers through high-quality demos, technical evangelism, and community-driven product iterations.

items: 工作流自动化 / Workflow Automation

degree.zh: 计算机科学与工程学士

zh: [技术布道 & Demo] 使用 Vibe Coding 方法论（Cursor、Claude Code）设计并实现高度可复用的 AI Demo 与快速原型，显著降低开发者与业务方的上手门槛。
[工具链 & 最佳实践] 基于 n8n 和 Coze Luopan 编排复杂 AI 工作流，管理 Prompt 版本迭代，输出内部最佳实践与技术文档，优化团队效率。
[反馈闭环 & 共创] 作为工程与业务/用户团队间的关键桥梁，建立反馈闭环，收集痛点、将需求转化为产品模块，持续推动 AI 工具链升级迭代。
en: [Tech Evangelism & Demos] Designed and implemented highly reproducible AI demos and rapid prototypes using vibe coding methodologies (Cursor, Claude Code), significantly lowering the onboarding barrier for developers and stakeholders.

[Toolchain & Best Practices] Orchestrated complex AI workflows using n8n and Coze Luopan, managing prompt versioning and publishing internal best practices/technical documentation to optimize team efficiency.

[Feedback Loop & Co-creation] Served as the critical bridge between engineering and business/user teams. Established a feedback loop to collect pain points, translate requirements into product modules, and continuously push the AI toolchain to the next level.

zh: 开发基于 C++ 的数据库数据脱敏及加解密中间件后端系统。
构建并维护中间层架构，实现数据包/流量级别的实时加解密，支持多种主流数据库。
设计安全数据处理与传输流程，确保企业敏感数据合规性。
en: Developed C++ backend systems for database data masking and encryption middleware.
Maintained middleware layer for packet-level encryption across multiple databases.
Designed secure data transmission workflows to improve sensitive data protection.

zh: 参与内部系统开发及大规模前端框架迁移项目，提升系统稳定性与发布质量。
开发专项内部工具以提升工程效率，优化开发者工作流（Developer Experience）。
在全球化跨职能团队中高效协作，展现出色的 Business English 沟通能力与复杂技术生态导航能力。
en: Contributed to internal system development and large-scale frontend framework migrations, improving system stability and release quality.
Developed specialized internal tools to enhance engineering efficiency and optimize developer workflows (Developer Experience).
Collaborated globally across cross-functional teams, demonstrating strong business English communication and navigating complex technical ecosystems.

zh: 使用 Angular 和 Node.js 开发全栈架构的员工端内部系统。
实施自动化测试并优化 QA 工作流，支持更快速可靠的功能发布。
与产品及工程相关方跨部门协作，交付关键业务功能。
en: Developed employee-facing systems using Angular and Node.js in a full-stack environment.
Implemented automated testing and optimized QA workflows for reliable releases.
Collaborated cross-functionally with product and engineering stakeholders to deliver critical business features.

description.zh: 帮助零代码基础的女性学员从零上手 Web3 与 Solidity 开发，通过体系化教学将复杂的区块链概念拆解为可实操的学习路径。
description.en: Guiding women with zero coding background into Web3 and Solidity development, breaking down complex blockchain concepts into hands-on, structured learning paths.

description.zh: 在校期间活跃参与女性编程社区，参与技术讨论与学习小组，助力女性开发者互助成长。
description.en: Actively participated in a female developer community, engaging in technical discussions and study groups to foster mutual growth.

description.zh: 面向研究生的课程辅导与技术讲解，协助教授完成教学任务。
description.en: Graduate-level course instruction and technical mentoring, assisting professor with teaching duties and developing technical evangelism skills.
